HGSS.536.0000:
Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
My husband’s always
so busy--I hope he’s OK.\f
When he’s caught up in his Pokémon
research, he even forgets to eat.

Hi, [0103,0000,0000]!\f
My husband’s always
so busy--I hope he’s OK.\f
When he’s caught up in his Pokémon

HGSS.536.0002:
When I grow up, I’m going to help
my dad!\f
I’m going to be a great
Pokémon Professor!
HGSS.536.0003:
“Pokémon. Where do they come from?
Where are they going?\f
Why has no one ever witnessed a
Pokémon’s birth?\f
I want to know! I will dedicate my\f
life to the study of Pokémon!”\f
...\f
It’s a part of Professor Elm’s
research papers.
